mdSummary:
# SwipeActions

Swipe Actions component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/swipe-actions

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SwipeActions | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SwipeActions | LeadingActions | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SwipeActions | TrailingActions | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SwipeActions | ActivationThresholdPx | `double` | `80` |  |
| SwipeActions | AriaLabel | `string` | `"Swipeable item — use arrow keys to reveal actions"` | Accessible label for the swipeable row, announced to AT users who can't see the gesture affordance. |
| SwipeActions | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SwipeActions | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (SwipeActions) — RenderFragment slot
- `LeadingActions` (SwipeActions) — RenderFragment slot
- `TrailingActions` (SwipeActions) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `ArrowLeft` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowLeft in SwipeActions.razor
- `ArrowRight` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowRight in SwipeActions.razor
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in SwipeActions.razor
- `Home` — HandleKeyDown handles Home in SwipeActions.razor

## Example
```razor
<SwipeActions />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-ring`

## Files
- `UI/SwipeActions/SwipeActions.razor`
